task_completion.description: Open the target rocket design in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window is visible, and the rocket design tree or title bar shows 'altitude_tuning_rocket' loaded.

task_completion.description: Increase the airframe drag and mass (e.g., by lengthening the body tube)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A component configuration window (such as 'Body Tube') is open in OpenRocket, showing the user increasing the length, diameter, or mass parameters.

task_completion.description: Run a simulation to verify the apogee is 200m-250m and stability is >= 1.0 caliber
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket is visible, showing a completed simulation run with an Apogee value strictly between 200m and 250m, and a Stability value of 1.0 cal or higher.
The OpenRocket window shows the file is saved (e.g., clicking 'Save', or the absence of an unsaved changes asterisk '*' next to the filename in the title bar).

task_completion.description: Write the modification report with required metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/exports/altitude_tuning_report.txt'. The document must explicitly list four metrics: the original length, the new length, the final apogee, and the stability margin.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket graphical interface is visible in the screenshots being interacted with. The agent did not bypass the GUI by writing a script to directly modify the .ork XML file.

integrity.description: The motor was kept as an Estes C6-5
integrity.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket 'Motors & Configuration' or 'Flight simulations' tab, the motor is still listed as an Estes C6-5 (or C6). The agent did not change the motor to lower the apogee.

integrity.description: The report contains genuine simulation data
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the modification report contains actual numeric values for the lengths, apogee, and stability that match the OpenRocket simulation results, rather than generic placeholders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target rocket file is '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/altitude_tuning_rocket.ork'. The target report file is '/home/ga/Documents/exports/altitude_tuning_report.txt'. The apogee must be strictly between 200.0m and 250.0m. The stability margin must be >= 1.0 caliber. The motor must remain an Estes C6 (or C6-5). The body tube length must be increased by at least 0.02m.
